title: Tertiary support for Garden Route students and their families at STADIO
description: BUSINESS NEWS - JSE-listed STADIO is one of...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - JSE-listed STADIO is one of the largest private higher education providers in South Africa and aims to widen access to quality and affordable higher education across distance and contact learning.


> With more than 90 accredited qualifications in commerce, IT, education, law, design, fashion and more, STADIO has options for every prospective student, wherever they are located in South Africa.


“We’re thrilled to be nominated for Best of George because it means people in the Garden Route recognise our presence in the region,” says Johann Ueckermann, STADIO George support centre manager. “Our STADIO George Support centre recently moved to a more convenient and central location, and we encourage you to visit us and engage with one of our support advisors.”

About STADIO in George STADIO’s Southern Cape support centre is located at 19 Courtenay Street and offers prospective and current STADIO students along the Garden Route the chance to have a face-to-face interaction with a support advisor, which is often the quickest way to find the help or encouragement needed.

“We offer affordable distance learning qualifications, with most of our degrees being under R30 000 per year,” says Ueckermann. “Our support advisors are here to help you with everything from guidance on courses to modes of learning, fee structures and administrative questions.”

Ueckermann says that STADIO is working to develop relationships with communities along the Garden Route while continuing to provide ongoing support to existing STADIO students. “Our aim is to encourage foot traffic STADIO Tertiary support for Garden Route students and their families to our support centres. We want to be easy to find and to become part of local communities, developing relationships with businesses and schools and meeting their needs.”

Registered students have access to spaces to study – with free Wi-Fi – and to collaborate on group projects, connect with one another, and grab a cup of tea or coffee.

The STADIO office in Courtenay Street.

Vote for STADIO “A vote for STADIO for Best of George will help us to boost our visibility with more prospective students and community partners,” says Ueckermann.


> Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/


“We ask for your help in this – voting for us means you’re supporting our mission of making quality higher education accessible to more people across South Africa. We appreciate your support and look forward to continuing to build strong ties with the local community and people living, working and, hopefully, studying along the Garden Route. For more information on our offering, visit our website, www.stadio.ac.za, or - even better - pop in for a visit!”

- Contact us on 044 124 4000 or visit us at 19 Courtenay St, George Central.Operating hours: 07:00-17:00

Gurshwin Damons in the STADIO showing a potential student what STADIO has to offer.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
